title: Changed Portals
description: Replaces the traditional obsidian portals with a different block
body:
### **Changed Portals**

This mod replaces the traditional obsidian for portal frames with a new block, obsidian bricks!

When traveling through a portal for the first time, an obsidian brick portal will be auto created, instead of obsidian.

#### Known issues
- Ruined portals are not altered, so they will just fail to work.
